data.title: Norfolk Southern site in Alabama gets platinum REDI designation, top honor for industrial development.
data.description: In the Shoals region of northwest Alabama, a rail-served industrial development site operated by Norfolk Southern (NYSE: NSC) has recently achieved a platinum designation from the national REDI Sites Program. This prestigious recognition is reserved for exclusive properties that meet stringent criteria for excellence in development. Located in the vibrant region, the site offers exceptional opportunities for industrial growth and success.

data.title: F.N.B. Corp declares $0.12 dividend per share on common stock, payable to shareholders on March 16, 2026.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, in Pittsburgh, F.N.B. Corporation (NYSE: FNB) disclosed that its Board of Directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.12 per share for its common stock. The dividend is scheduled to be distributed on March 16, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on March 2...

data.title: Giuseppe B. Commisso appointed President of ACF Fiorentina with Mark Stephan as CEO & Alessandro Ferrari as GM.
data.description: Mediacom Communications made a significant announcement today stating that Giuseppe B. Commisso has been appointed as the President of the ACF Fiorentina Board of Directors. This decision was made during a recent meeting where Mark Stephan was also confirmed to continue as the Chief Executive Officer, and Alessandro Ferrari appointed as the General Manager. Giuseppe B. Commisso, who has previously served in high-ranking positions within the Club, expressed his gratitude for this new opportunity.

data.title: Kyocera creates inkjet printhead with 1,500+ nozzles for high-viscosity materials, to boost inkjet tech in industries.
data.description: Kyocera Corporation, based in Kyoto, Japan, has introduced a pioneering inkjet printhead designed for industrial use. The newly developed printhead is the first of its kind, able to manage high-viscosity materials, thanks to Kyocera's innovative piezo actuator and fluid channel technology. This advancement is anticipated to broaden the utilization of inkjet technology in various industrial sectors. The introduction of this printhead marks a significant development in industrial printing, paving the way for enhanced capabilities in advanced manufacturing processes.

data.title: NEP Australia introduces software-first OB unit, shifting to hybrid workflows with all video and audio processing done using software.
data.description: In Melbourne, Australia, NEP Australia, a part of NEP Group, a global leader in media services for live sports and entertainment, has unveiled a novel outside broadcast (OB) center that embraces the trend towards hybrid workflows blending software and hardware. This cutting-edge facility marks a significant shift in the industry, with all video and audio processing being handled by software. This latest OB facility by NEP Australia exemplifies a modern approach to broadcasting, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation and adaptability.

data.title: A company now owns $63 billion in Bitcoin, revealing its largest purchases. Learn how they achieved this impressive feat.
data.description: How did Michael Saylor's company accumulate a significant amount of Bitcoin? Let's review the strategy that led to the impressive gains and record stash of the cryptocurrency.

data.title: Dow drops, Nasdaq rises; UnitedHealth stock falls. S&P 500 winner in restaurant food distributor.
data.description: Today in the stock market, the Dow Jones index experienced a significant drop, largely due to a decline in UnitedHealth stock. On a positive note, a restaurant food distributor saw substantial gains and emerged as a top performer in the S&P 500. The Nasdaq was a bright spot, leading the way amidst the overall slide for the Dow. Additionally, an auto giant achieved a historic milestone, adding an element of intrigue to today's market activity.

data.title: IgniteTech to be exclusive sponsor for Generative AI Expo 2026 at Fort Lauderdale Convention Center on Feb 10-12.
data.description: In Austin, Texas on January 27, 2026, IgniteTech, an AI-DNA Enterprise Software company, revealed that it has secured the title of Exclusive Presenting Sponsor for the upcoming Generative AI Expo. The event is scheduled for February 10-12, 2026, at the Greater Fort Lauderdale/Broward County Convention Center.

data.title: Tom Lee stated that gold and silver rally are impacting Bitcoin and Ethereum, with metals reaching $5,000 and $110 respectively, causing a lack of action in cryptocurrencies due to traders focusing on precious metals.
data.description: Tom Lee from Fundstrat stated that the recent rally in metals has been diverting attention away from Bitcoin and other cryptocurrencies. In a recent CNBC interview, Lee explained that the lack of significant price increases in the crypto market can be attributed to the flow of money towards metals like gold, which surpassed $5,000, and silver, reaching $110. These substantial movements in the metals market attract traders looking to capitalize on the momentum, utilizing borrowed money or options to enhance their investments. This has led to a situation where funds that would typically be invested in cryptocurrencies are being tied up in metals. Additionally, the crypto industry experienced a significant deleveraging after the October crash, further limiting available capital for investments. Despite these challenges, Lee remains optimistic about the future of cryptocurrencies and anticipates a surge in their value. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Noble stock receives Relative Strength Rating upgrade to 80-plus level. Reported by Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Noble's Relative Strength Rating has surged past 80, indicating strong performance. The latest update on Noble Stock's Relative Strength Rating was shared recently.

data.title: ServiceNow stock drops ahead of Q4 earnings report. Expected to post earnings of 72 cents per share, following previous $2.40 per share. Strong Q3 performance with subscription revenue at $3.3 billion, up 21.5% YoY.
data.description: ServiceNow Inc (NYSE: NOW) is experiencing a decrease in shares as investors anticipate the company's upcoming fourth-quarter earnings report. Analysts are predicting earnings of 72 cents per share for the quarter, based on estimates from Benzinga Pro. In comparison, ServiceNow reported GAAP earnings of $2.40 per diluted share in the last quarter. The company enters the report with a strong momentum following a successful third quarter, surpassing guidance across all major growth and profitability metrics. Subscription revenue rose to $3.3 billion, a 21.5% increase year-over-year, while total revenue also surged by 22% to $3.41 billion. ServiceNow demonstrated significant improvements in remaining performance metrics.

data.title: Trump threatens 10% tariff on 8 European allies opposing Greenland acquisition, intensifying Supreme Court situation.
data.description: The President of the United States, Donald Trump, has announced a plan to enforce a 10 percent tariff starting on February 1 on eight European allies who disagree with his desire to purchase Greenland. This move intensifies the situation leading up to an imminent Supreme Court decision.

data.title: Watercrest Senior Living Group aims to enhance culinary operations in 2026, led by Executive Chef Will Poirier.
data.description: In Vero Beach, Florida, on January 27, 2026, Watercrest Senior Living Group announced their commitment to enhancing the resident dining experience through culinary excellence. The focus for the year includes growth and training efforts. Executive Chef Will Poirier, a key figure in this initiative, has been promoted recently to spearhead the culinary development.

data.title: Vacationers in 2026 urged to seek expert help for better deals & savings; highlights on National Plan for Vacation Day.
data.description: National Plan for Vacation Day is emphasizing the benefits of seeking expert assistance and accessing tailored deals to conserve time, alleviate stress, and save money on vacations. Recent data indicates that preparing for a vacation has become increasingly costly and tedious, with a growing number of travelers experiencing difficulties in navigating the process. The initiative, observed on January 27, 2026, aims to promote the advantages of utilizing curated packages and expert guidance to optimize the vacation experience. Such services have shown to be particularly beneficial as they can help individuals save considerable amounts of money and time, ensuring a more enjoyable and hassle-free trip.

data.title: Milliman analysis shows pension risk transfer cost increased to 100.3% from 100.1% in December, up by 20 basis points.
data.description: Seattle-based consulting and actuarial firm Milliman, Inc. released the most recent data from its Milliman Pension Buyout Index (MPBI) indicating a slight increase in the estimated cost to offload retiree pension risk to an insurer through a competitive bidding process. In December, the cost went up by 20 basis points from 100.1% to 100.3% of a plan's accounting liabilities (accumulated benefit obligation or ABO). This means that the estimated retiree Pension Risk Transfer (PRT) cost now stands at 100.3% of a plan's ABO.

data.title: RTW Foundation donates $8M to Perelman School of Medicine for innovative physician training program.
data.description: In Philadelphia, a significant $8 million donation from the RTW Foundation, spearheaded by Rod Wong, M’03, and Marti Speranza Wong, C’98, who is a member of the Penn Medicine Board of Trustees, is set to kick start a pioneering venture aimed at transforming medical education at the Perelman School of Medicine at the University of Pennsylvania. This donation stands as the largest ever received by PSOM to enhance its curriculum, guaranteeing that the oldest medical school in the United States will maintain its position as a top institution in preparing future physicians.

data.title: Century Park Capital Partners successfully exits MCCi, an investment banking firm in Tallahassee, Florida.
data.description: Century Park Capital Partners, an investment banking firm, has recently announced the successful exit of MCCi. The company did not disclose the exact financial details of the transaction. This news highlights the continued success of Century Park Capital Partners in their investment strategies.
